notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Cody Bellinger steals (1) 2nd base. Trent Grisham scores. Cody Bellinger to 3rd. Throwing error by catcher Cal Raleigh.

notableEvents.label: Josh Naylor GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Josh Naylor grounds into a double play, shortstop José Caballero to first baseman Ben Rice. Julio Rodríguez out at 2nd. Josh Naylor out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Aaron Judge GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Aaron Judge grounds into a double play, shortstop Leo Rivas to first baseman Josh Naylor. Trent Grisham out at 2nd. Aaron Judge out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Giancarlo Stanton GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Giancarlo Stanton grounds into a double play, shortstop Leo Rivas to second baseman Cole Young to first baseman Josh Naylor. Ben Rice out at 2nd. Giancarlo Stanton out at 1st.
